title: publish-placeholder executor
description: Publishes a 0.0.0 placeholder tarball to the npm registry for every workspace package that is not yet published. Idempotent.

scope.description: Package scope prefixes to check. Default: every package in packages/*.

placeholderTag.description: npm dist-tag applied to the placeholder publish.

placeholderVersion.description: Version written into the temporary placeholder package.json.

dryRun.description: If true, do not actually publish or pack; just report what would happen.
